summary: Completed comprehensive testing of B2B Plywood/Timber ordering system new features. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified Admin Orders V2 with Edit modal, simplified statuses, Products V2 with Excel template/upload, and Customer/Sales Portal quantity dropdowns and mandatory transport validation.
seed_data_creation: Created test orders and products during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new V2 features are working correctly. Admin Orders V2 has Edit button that opens modal with quantity/price inputs, simplified statuses (Order Placed/Approved/Delivered/Cancelled), Approve and Cancel buttons. Products V2 has Download Template, Upload Excel, Export buttons, and Add Product modal with variant pricing (6 tiers). Customer and Sales portals have quantity dropdown with preset values [1,2,3,4,5,10,15,20,25,50,100,custom] and mandatory transport modal with Vehicle Number, Driver Name, Driver Phone fields.

admin_orders_edit_modal.details: Edit button opens modal with quantity and unit price inputs. Save updates order with new prices. Modal shows calculated totals (Sub Total, CGST, SGST, Grand Total).

admin_orders_simplified_statuses.details: Status filters show: Order Placed (Pending), Approved, Delivered, Cancelled. Status badges display correctly.

admin_orders_approve_cancel.details: Approve button confirms order and creates invoice. Cancel button cancels order. Both work via API and UI.

admin_products_excel_template.details: Download Template button downloads product_import_template.xlsx with headers and sample data.

admin_products_excel_upload.details: Upload Excel button accepts .xlsx files and imports products with variants.

admin_products_add_modal.details: Add Product modal has Product Name, Group (Plywood/Timber), Description, Variants section with Thickness, Size, Stock Qty, and 6-tier pricing inputs (T1-T6).

customer_portal_quantity_dropdown.details: Quantity dropdown shows preset values: 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 10, 15, 20, 25, 50, 100, custom

customer_portal_transport_mandatory.details: Transport modal requires Vehicle Number, Driver Name, Driver Phone (10 digits). Shows validation message 'All transport details are required'. Place Order button disabled until all fields filled.

sales_portal_quantity_dropdown.details: Same quantity dropdown as customer portal with preset values.

sales_portal_transport_mandatory.details: Same transport validation as customer portal.

api_tests_summary.TestOrdersV2: 6/6 passed - Status filters, pending first, edit prices, approve, cancel
api_tests_summary.TestProductsV2: 5/5 passed - Download template, export, create with variants, get products, filter by group
api_tests_summary.TestSalesPortal: 3/3 passed - Login, get customers, get products
